In this version, we’ve implemented bug fixes & performance improvements.

We have also implemented our new reward calendar feature - collect your daily rewards!

notes:

title: Last War:Survival
notes:

title: Watcher of Realms
notes:
1. [Anniversary Celebration]
The Anniversary Celebration events are launching soon, bringing tons of rewarding events!

2. [New Raids]
Challenge the brand‑new Gallery of War and Final Frontier.

3. [Faction Trial]
New [Arbitration and Dominion] stages are now available, featuring new Bosses and mechanics!

4. [Adjustments & Optimizations]
Enhanced and adjusted multiple heroes. Increased the Background Auto-fight speed to 6x.

title: Happy Screw Trip 3D
Fun Bridge
notes: Appen uppdateras regelbundet (buggkorrigeringar och förbättrad prestanda) för att erbjuda dig den bästa spelupplevelsen. Tack för att du använder Funbridge!

title: Match Villains
notes:
Fireworks up, summer on. 100 new levels await!

NEW ITEM: LAVA BORDER! The board looks quiet… maybe too quiet. Make matches and reveal what’s hiding under the heat.

NEW EVENT: MUSEUM BREAK! Tick-tock, Villains. Move deeper into the museum, grab the rewards, and try not to look too suspicious.

NEW SAFE CRACKERS: JULY FOURTH! Crack safes and unlock a firework-ready NEW STYLE.

NEW POSTER: ANCIENT GIANTS! Big heads, bigger secrets. These ancient faces know something.

Stay sharp, Villains!

title: Tiles Survive!
notes:
[Optymalizacje i poprawki]
- Dodano nowy przycisk „Pomiń” do Ekspedycji Honorowej, by naczelnicy mogli natychmiast kończyć bitwy w szybkim wyzwaniu.

- Zoptymalizowano logikę zakupu biletów wyzwań na arenie w sklepie VIP. Gdy arena i arena 3v3 są niedostępne, tego przedmiotu nie można już kupić, aby zapobiec przypadkowemu wydaniu klejnotów.

- Ulepszono animacje poszukiwań i funkcję pomijania oraz naprawiono rzadki problem powodujący zacinanie się gry podczas kolejnych poszukiwań.

title: Truck Star Match
notes:
Redo för en spännande uppdatering?

- 200 nya nivåer tillagda, spännande utmaningar väntar!
- Reparera och modifiera de helt nya truckarna PowerBull-ATX och Azure Blade.
- Det nya tidsbegränsade modifieringsevenemanget Frosty Fusion är live och erbjuder fantastiska belöningar som du inte får missa!
- Optimerad topplistafunktion, fler tävlingar väntar på din utmaning!

Upptäck mer spännande innehåll! Uppdatera nu och upplev det på nära håll!

title: Hunting Sniper: Showdown
notes:
Hunting Sniper Update Notes
• NEW TOUR: Tour 20 is now live, featuring brand-new content for you to explore.
• NEW EVENTS: The 3rd Anniversary Event is coming soon, with rich rewards waiting to be claimed.
• NEW BULLETS: Discover new themed Bullets with unique attributes to sharpen your hunt.
• PERFORMANCE OPTIMIZATION: Fixed known issues and improved overall game performance.
